texts.label: text
texts.orig: Introduction
texts.text: Introduction

texts.label: text
texts.orig: VistA Blood Establishment Computer System (VBECS) was released with many known problems and open issues. VistA patch OR*3.0*212 provides the interface between the (Computerized Patient Record System) CPRS and VBECS. OR*3.0*309 was conceived to help resolve some of the known problems and increase the value of VBECS to the customer base.
texts.text: VistA Blood Establishment Computer System (VBECS) was released with many known problems and open issues. VistA patch OR*3.0*212 provides the interface between the (Computerized Patient Record System) CPRS and VBECS. OR*3.0*309 was conceived to help resolve some of the known problems and increase the value of VBECS to the customer base.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Functionality
texts.text: Functionality

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This patch enhances the Blood Bank report to display Blood Bank orders with the newest date on the top and going subsequent down to the oldest date at the bottom of the report.  The results display horizontally with “Canned” comments marked by with an asterisk next to the test and displayed at the bottom of the testing results.  The components are being returned to total components/day.  Test sites also requested the Unit section on the Patient Information Tab be move closer to the top allowing provider to see the units without scrolling down.  Multidivisons, have no way to know what site performed the tests, thus CPRS is adding the division code next to the test results.  Added a default parameter, OR VBECS Legacy to turn the on the Legacy Blood Bank report.  CPRS added code to remove the duplicate blood bank data.
texts.text: This patch enhances the Blood Bank report to display Blood Bank orders with the newest date on the top and going subsequent down to the oldest date at the bottom of the report.  The results display horizontally with “Canned” comments marked by with an asterisk next to the test and displayed at the bottom of the testing results.  The components are being returned to total components/day.  Test sites also requested the Unit section on the Patient Information Tab be move closer to the top allowing provider to see the units without scrolling down.  Multidivisons, have no way to know what site performed the tests, thus CPRS is adding the division code next to the test results.  Added a default parameter, OR VBECS Legacy to turn the on the Legacy Blood Bank report.  CPRS added code to remove the duplicate blood bank data.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The functionality allows Reason for Request and Surgery prompts for any kind of order.  The collection type was moved next to the diagnostic test or component on the Active Orders on the Orders Tab.  CPRS/VBECS contains Discontinue information in the Activity Section from backdoor discontinued orders.  Unsigned orders were removed from the duplicate Type and Screen order check.  It is now possible to add VBECS to auto-dc rule in the CPRS rule editor option.
texts.text: The functionality allows Reason for Request and Surgery prompts for any kind of order.  The collection type was moved next to the diagnostic test or component on the Active Orders on the Orders Tab.  CPRS/VBECS contains Discontinue information in the Activity Section from backdoor discontinued orders.  Unsigned orders were removed from the duplicate Type and Screen order check.  It is now possible to add VBECS to auto-dc rule in the CPRS rule editor option.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Pre-Conditions to Installation
texts.text: Pre-Conditions to Installation

texts.label: text
texts.orig: OR*3*309 requires VBECS and OR*3*212 and CPRS 27 or CPRS 27.N.
texts.text: OR*3*309 requires VBECS and OR*3*212 and CPRS 27 or CPRS 27.N.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Changes and Fixes to the Blood Bank Report
texts.text: Changes and Fixes to the Blood Bank Report

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Blood Bank report found on the Labs and Reports tabs was showing data coming from VBECS twice (the entire report was being duplicated) when the parameter OR VBECS LEGACY REPORT was set to yes. (ORWRP2)
texts.text: The Blood Bank report found on the Labs and Reports tabs was showing data coming from VBECS twice (the entire report was being duplicated) when the parameter OR VBECS LEGACY REPORT was set to yes. (ORWRP2)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Changed sort order of results displayed on reports to reverse chronologic order. (CQ 17823)
texts.text: Changed sort order of results displayed on reports to reverse chronologic order. (CQ 17823)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Changed results to display horizontally rather than vertically (CQ 17824)
texts.text: Changed results to display horizontally rather than vertically (CQ 17824)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Changed the VBECS canned comments display to once (CQ 17825)
texts.text: Changed the VBECS canned comments display to once (CQ 17825)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: VBECS component transfusions were totaled per day in CPRS V26, changed functionality to match. (CQ 17976)
texts.text: VBECS component transfusions were totaled per day in CPRS V26, changed functionality to match. (CQ 17976)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Moved the UNITS section of the report on the Patient Info tab of the Blood order dialog up higher in the report so that it can be seen without having to scroll down. (CQ 17731)
texts.text: Moved the UNITS section of the report on the Patient Info tab of the Blood order dialog up higher in the report so that it can be seen without having to scroll down. (CQ 17731)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Multi Division Potential Problem - Unable to differentiate where testing is performed. (CQ 18484)
texts.text: Multi Division Potential Problem - Unable to differentiate where testing is performed. (CQ 18484)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Changed OR VBECS LEGACY parameter default to Yes, but allow sites that have it set to remain the way it is set. (CQ 18101)
texts.text: Changed OR VBECS LEGACY parameter default to Yes, but allow sites that have it set to remain the way it is set. (CQ 18101)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: VBECS changes to ^LROSBR by VBECS team (VBECS Legacy report) Resolution – Added code to stop the duplicate Blood Bank Report displaying. (CQ 18044)
texts.text: VBECS changes to ^LROSBR by VBECS team (VBECS Legacy report) Resolution – Added code to stop the duplicate Blood Bank Report displaying. (CQ 18044)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Changes and Fixes to the Blood Order Dialog
texts.text: Changes and Fixes to the Blood Order Dialog

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Removed the Ask on Condition value for the Reason for Request and Surgery prompts, allowing them to be answered for any blood order. (CQ 18033)
texts.text: Removed the Ask on Condition value for the Reason for Request and Surgery prompts, allowing them to be answered for any blood order. (CQ 18033)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Moved the collection type earlier in the order text. (CQ 17687)
texts.text: Moved the collection type earlier in the order text. (CQ 17687)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Added DC information to the Activity Section of the parent order when child orders are dc’d from VBECS. (CQ 18196)
texts.text: Added DC information to the Activity Section of the parent order when child orders are dc’d from VBECS. (CQ 18196)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Prior to this patch the check for a current Type & Screen during the ordering process was including unreleased/unsigned orders; with this patch, unreleased/unsigned orders will no longer be included in the check for Type & Screen. (CQ 18227)
texts.text: Prior to this patch the check for a current Type & Screen during the ordering process was including unreleased/unsigned orders; with this patch, unreleased/unsigned orders will no longer be included in the check for Type & Screen. (CQ 18227)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Displayed Lab results were not saving correctly with the order, when the first item returned by Lab was a comment rather than a result value; this caused a System Exception error in VBECS when the “PR” lab result message was sent from CPRS.  The lab results are now being saved correctly with the order, eliminating the exception error. (CQ 18448)
texts.text: Displayed Lab results were not saving correctly with the order, when the first item returned by Lab was a comment rather than a result value; this caused a System Exception error in VBECS when the “PR” lab result message was sent from CPRS.  The lab results are now being saved correctly with the order, eliminating the exception error. (CQ 18448)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Prior to this patch, CPRS did not allow auto-DC of VBECS orders; this patch updates the package screen in the OE/RR Auto-DC Rules file to accept VBECS. (CQ 18494)
texts.text: Prior to this patch, CPRS did not allow auto-DC of VBECS orders; this patch updates the package screen in the OE/RR Auto-DC Rules file to accept VBECS. (CQ 18494)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: VBECS date/time is changing request date when a second, third units are order, when testing completes. (CQ 18644)
texts.text: VBECS date/time is changing request date when a second, third units are order, when testing completes. (CQ 18644)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: VBECS Remedy HD 340648 Unit Request Date changes the previous order when  adding a component (CQ 18655)
texts.text: VBECS Remedy HD 340648 Unit Request Date changes the previous order when  adding a component (CQ 18655)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: VBECS Manually expired specimens not recognized by CPRS, allows ordering RBC w/o T&S. (CQ 18690)
texts.text: VBECS Manually expired specimens not recognized by CPRS, allows ordering RBC w/o T&S. (CQ 18690)

texts.text: Remedy Tickets

texts.orig: OR*3*309 Remedy ticket #286113, the VBECS patient information tab has the number of units available at the bottom of screen. The preferred placement is on the top.
texts.text: OR*3*309 Remedy ticket #286113, the VBECS patient information tab has the number of units available at the bottom of screen. The preferred placement is on the top.
